CHAT.label: General Research & Exploration
CHAT.guidance: Focus on discovery, indexing, and general Q&A.
CHAT.thinking_pattern: Feel free to record thoughts and brainstorm. Your write operations here are for scratchpad purposes and do not affect project code.

NORMAL.label: Standard Development
NORMAL.guidance: Focus on iterative development and task fulfillment.
NORMAL.thinking_pattern: Small steps, iterative progress. Provide immediate feedback.

TASK.label: Deep Research
TASK.guidance: Focus on deep investigation and exhaustive output.
TASK.thinking_pattern: Deep tracking. Record findings. Output comprehensive reports.
